text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During a dance lesson with Manhattan Cafe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shuffle... Shuffle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has the general movements down, but they
don't quite fit the music...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: My dancing is a little... off, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Do you think... I should dance more in time with
the rhythm? Or should we change the song...
choice_data_list: Let's try switching to a ballad.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Okay... I'll give it a go. More energy...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Whoa there... What the heck are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Oh, Shakur... Are you here to dance as well?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Who cares what I'm here for. We need to talk
about that dance you just did.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You were stiff as a board and your face was twice as wooden. That's not you at all.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Let's think logically here. What do your fans want
from you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
'Cause I can tell you it's not some half-baked
attempt to look all cutesy. Am I wrong?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...No, you're right.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I see what I have to do now... Thank you for the
kind advice.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What?! I wasn't trying to be kind. That weird
dance of yours was bothering me, that's all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If nothing else, Air Shakur has at least given us
some useful critique.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: A ballad... That might just work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure why, but the longer I watch her
dance, the heavier my eyelids feel...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Listening to the slow and winding melody... with
its melancholy tone...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...This is nice, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe continues to dance for quite
some time...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Hey, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hm? We're in the dance studio...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I snap to my senses, only to find myself back in
the dance studio. It's strange, for a moment there
I felt like I was in a whole other world...
